Bug / Task Description: CircuitBreaker and RetryPolicy both use type() identity checks instead of isinstance() when comparing exceptions against their configured exception sets. A subclass exception raised by application code is silently ignored by the circuit breaker and bypasses retry rules, because neither CircuitBreaker.record_failure nor RetryPolicy.should_retry recognise subclass instances. Fix both so that exception hierarchy matching works correctly throughout the retry and circuit-breaking stack.
Commit Subject: fix(retry): use isinstance for exception hierarchy matching in CircuitBreaker and RetryPolicy
